nasb.text: And the rain fell, and the floods came, and the winds blew and slammed against that house; and yet it did not fall, for it had been founded on the rock.

esv.text: And the rain fell, and the floods came, and the winds blew and beat on that house, but it did not fall, because it had been founded on the rock.

cnv.text: 雨淋、水沖、風吹，搖撼那房子，房子卻不倒塌，因為建基在磐石上。

ccb.text: 任由风吹雨打、洪水冲击，房子仍屹立不倒，因为它建基在磐石上。

csbs.text: 大雨降下，急流冲来，狂风刮起，撞击那房子，房子却没有倒塌，因为它在磐石上立定根基。
